channel.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
channel.description: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Why This Chili Wins Every Time
item.description: Discover what makes this hearty chili a consistent favorite, from rich spices to perfectly melted cheese. A comforting recipe ideal for family dinners or gatherings.

media:content.media:title: Why This Chili Wins Every Time
media:content.media:description: Discover what makes this hearty chili a consistent favorite, from rich spices to perfectly melted cheese. A comforting recipe ideal for family dinners or gatherings.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB: Beef and Rice
item.description: A comforting beef and rice recipe from Smokin' and Grillin' with AB, made for easy home cooking.

media:content.media:title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB: Beef and Rice
media:content.media:description: A comforting beef and rice recipe from Smokin' and Grillin' with AB, made for easy home cooking.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Popcorn Shrimp Inspired by a Favorite
item.description: Make crispy, golden popcorn shrimp at home with a flavorful coating and tender bite. A fun and easy recipe inspired by a popular fast-food favorite.

media:content.media:title: Popcorn Shrimp Inspired by a Favorite
media:content.media:description: Make crispy, golden popcorn shrimp at home with a flavorful coating and tender bite. A fun and easy recipe inspired by a popular fast-food favorite.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: How to Keep Chicken Juicy
item.description: Learn simple cooking techniques that help lock in moisture and flavor, plus tips for pairing your chicken with a rich, homemade gravy.

media:content.media:title: How to Keep Chicken Juicy
media:content.media:description: Learn simple cooking techniques that help lock in moisture and flavor, plus tips for pairing your chicken with a rich, homemade gravy.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Creamy Broccoli Cheddar Soup
item.description: Warm up with a rich and creamy broccoli cheddar soup made with simple ingredients. A comforting recipe that’s perfect for cozy lunches or family dinners.

media:content.media:title: Creamy Broccoli Cheddar Soup
media:content.media:description: Warm up with a rich and creamy broccoli cheddar soup made with simple ingredients. A comforting recipe that’s perfect for cozy lunches or family dinners.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Spoonful of Nostalgic Flavor
item.description: Rediscover a comforting classic that brings back warm memories with every bite. This simple recipe blends tradition and flavor for a truly satisfying dish.

media:content.media:title: A Spoonful of Nostalgic Flavor
media:content.media:description: Rediscover a comforting classic that brings back warm memories with every bite. This simple recipe blends tradition and flavor for a truly satisfying dish.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Juicy Chicken Done Right
item.description: Discover simple tips for cooking tender, juicy chicken every time. An easy recipe idea that’s perfect for weeknight dinners and flavorful home meals.

media:content.media:title: Juicy Chicken Done Right
media:content.media:description: Discover simple tips for cooking tender, juicy chicken every time. An easy recipe idea that’s perfect for weeknight dinners and flavorful home meals.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Crispy Fried Chicken at Home
item.description: Learn how to make golden, crispy fried chicken with a flavorful coating and juicy center. A simple recipe perfect for family meals or weekend cooking.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Fried Chicken at Home
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make golden, crispy fried chicken with a flavorful coating and juicy center. A simple recipe perfect for family meals or weekend cooking.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
